Event Details • The Hollow Investigative Association has posted a public commission to all independent investigators regarding the Icedrift Hollow and plans to steadily release more information on different areas within over the course of the commission period. • The ground in the Icedrift Hollow is exceptionally fragile, and passing by a location will create fissures. When you pass by again, you will fall to a lower level of the Hollow, so please plan your route carefully. • Enter different areas of the Icedrift Hollow and, after completing Easy Commissions, you will unlock Hard Commissions. In Hard Commissions, you can collect scattered HIA data samples. • Completing the Event Commissions can earn you Polychromes, Hamster Cage Pass, and other rewards.

post.subject: Fair Use Statement
post.content: To ensure a fair and healthy gaming environment in Zenless Zone Zero and offer Proxies a great gaming experience, we would like to remind everyone that the following rules apply to everyone at all times: 1. Any plug-ins, boosters, and other third-party tools that affect the fairness of the game are strictly prohibited. HoYoverse (herein referred to as "we") will respond to any such activity by taking measures including but not limited to removal of inappropriately obtained rewards, suspension of accounts, and permanent banning of accounts, with the precise measures to be decided based on the seriousness and number of violations. 2. The sale, purchase, or transfer of accounts by any means is strictly forbidden. Please protect your personal information and property, do not trust any information regarding the sharing/trading of accounts, and do not buy game accounts on other platforms. Once we find your account is involved in account trading, we may take action, including but not limited to sending a warning and freezing your account. In accordance with the Terms of Service, we will not be responsible for any personal information leaks or damages resulting from Proxies' own actions.

post.subject: Zenless Zone Zero Amplifying Test Rules of Conduct
post.content: To ensure a fair and healthy gaming environment of Zenless Zone Zero and offer Proxies a great gaming experience, we would like to remind everyone that the following rules apply to everyone at all times: 1. Any plug-ins, speed-ups, and other third-party tools that affect the fairness of the game are strictly prohibited. HoYoverse (herein referred to as "we") will respond to any such activity by taking measures including but not limited to removal of inappropriately obtained rewards, suspension of accounts, and permanent banning of accounts, with the precise measures to be decided based on the seriousness and number of violations. 2. The sale, purchase, or transfer of accounts by any means is strictly prohibited. Please protect your personal information and property, do not trust any information regarding the sharing/trading of accounts, and do not buy game accounts on other platforms. In addition, only the Proxy themselves can access the game during the Amplifying Test. Once found, any account involved in account trading may be subject to consequences, including but not limited to sending a warning or banning your account. In accordance with Zenless Zone Zero's Terms of Service, we will not be responsible for any personal information leaks or damages resulting from Proxy's own actions.

post.subject: Zenless Zone Zero: Equalizing Test Fair Use Statement
post.content: To ensure a fair and healthy Zenless Zone Zero gaming environment and offer Proxies a great gaming experience, we would like to remind everyone that the following rules apply to everyone at all times: 1. Any plug-ins, trainers, and other third-party tools that affect the fairness of the game are strictly prohibited. HoYoverse (herein referred to as "we") will respond to any such activity by taking measures including but not limited to removal of inappropriately obtained rewards, suspension of accounts, and permanent banning of accounts, with the precise measures to be decided based on the seriousness and number of violations. 2. The sale, purchase, or transfer of accounts by any means is strictly forbidden. Please protect your personal information and property, do not trust any information regarding the sharing/trading of accounts, and do not buy game accounts on other platforms. In addition, only the Proxy themselves can access the game during the Equalizing Test. Please do not share or sell your game account. If we find any account is involved in account trading, we may take actions, including but not limited to sending a warning and banning your account. In accordance with Zenless Zone Zero's Privacy Policy, we hold no responsibility for and will not handle any leaks of personal information or losses that are caused by a Proxy's own actions
